## Description
Describe the changes you've made and the motivation behind them.

## Related Issue
If this PR fixes a bug or adds a feature from an existing issue, please link it here (e.g., Fixes #123).

## How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. 
- [ ] Tested Export with sample projects.
- [ ] Tested Import with modified files.
- [ ] Verified that metadata is preserved.

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added/updated tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
